reviews.review_text: For a friendly well looked after caravan park (limited spaces) the managers couldn’t be more helpful including the happy hour held by the wonderful couple clean tidy well catered for with shop general store bottle o aswell furry friends are most welcome be sure to clean up after your pets .. our young jack Russell soon liked the owners best judgment of wonderful people.. will definitely return.. 👍from Pauline Darrell and Finley🐶the terror
Nice spot nice town 👍

Came for the Fish and Chips as recommended by others and I love how simple the menu is and surprisingly, the fish was so yumz! My partner loves the fries with chicken salt. Absolutely stunning and highly recommend to stop by for fish and chips before heading to Yorketown!
Outstanding customer service with delicious take away food and alcohol available. Impossible to fault.

Our last stop on our family Yorke’s trip.
Amazing service, very friendly and a great selection of tasty, freshly cooked food.

Might make it our last stop every time. 👌
Has great hosts clean site  camp kitchen easy access  from main road
came here for 2 nights price was so cheep and in the keosk i got some fishing bait wich was amazing it had good amounts of bait for good prices

I was desperately trying to find something to eat on a lonely weekend drive and stumbled across a "takeaway" sign here, so stopped in, ordered... and I was pleasantly surprised with how good my fish and chips were! Bloke behind the counter was super friendly and they had a good selection of odds and ends for a yorkes trip in the shop.
Very clean. Great location. Very helpful staff.
Awesome service by the friendly as chick there. We left our credit card there n she ran out to give it to us.
Food is amazing. Staff are brilliant
Nice little caravan park. No frills park but everything very clean. Great base location to explore the surrounding areas. Had a pleasant 2 nights stay.

I stopped at Pine Point toilets. I  was pleasantly surprised by how clean & tidy they are. Great job. Just a note : can you please put up the sign "No Smoking" sign on the toilet doors. I walked into toilets to be greeted with heavy smoke. Thanks.😊 Many thanks for that. Will do. Ta muchly.
A good place to stay and check out the area.
Fantastic spot

Cute little caravan park run by Yvette and Gav who are just so friendly. We had a good size powered site and all amenities were clean. Camp kitchen happy hour would be our family favourite, meet other travellers or the usual yearly campers.  Highly recommend!
Friendly, well managed caravan park.  Not large, not grand - simply honest and refreshing.

Pine Point caravan park was a very clean friendly place to camp. My partner Trevor had the most wonderful time catching crabs at the beach thanks to Gavin. Gavin loaned Trevor the equiptment and advised him on how to catch the crabs. Sitting around the warm fire in the evening chatting with everyone at the park was beyond welcoming everyone was so nice and friendly. Pine Point caravan park is a credit to both Gavin and Evette wonderful place thankyou for our time there.  Jane and Trevor
Own accommodation facilities not the best but staff very helpful and little shop very handy, fish and chips cooked to perfection.

Great spot to base yourself and do all Yorke peninsula for adults, no play equipment, clean facilities. Friendly people happy hour in camp kitchen with warm fire, no smoke. On site vans if you need one
So friendly and helpful
Nice caravan park with a friendly general store.
Only stopped here to pay for black point caravan Park but the staff at the office and little store at pine Point are nice and friendly
